verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here among the shadows Living in a lonely land, We're a band Of pilgrims on the move; Burdened down with sorrows, And we're shunned on every hand, Looking for a city built above.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Looking for a city Where we'll never die, There the sainted millions, Never say goodbye There we'll meet our Savior, And our loved ones too, Come, oh Holy Spirit, All our hopes renew.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In this land of dangers Going here and there, Trusting in the blessed Savior's love. Tho' we may be strangers, In this world of care, Looking for a city built above.
